issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text says 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts only while it is your turn, not until end of turn.
Target should allow 0-1 selection (optional). Current 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' enforces selection. Should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxCount:1 or similar optional targeting.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn.
